name: itsyhome-windows
description: ItsyHome for Windows – Home Assistant system-tray client

scripts.dist: npm run build && (electron-builder || true) && CSC_IDENTITY_AUTO_DISCOVERY=false electron-builder --prepackaged release/win-unpacked
scripts.dist:win: npm run build && (electron-builder --win || true) && CSC_IDENTITY_AUTO_DISCOVERY=false electron-builder --win --prepackaged release/win-unpacked
